title: Web Courses
content: We offer a variety of web development courses including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and full-stack development.

title: Instructor Section
content: Our instructors are industry experts with years of experience. They provide hands-on guidance and feedback.

title: Pricing Plans
content: We offer different pricing plans for students: Free, Standard, and Premium. Each plan gives access to different levels of content and support.

title: How to Enroll
content: To enroll in a course, sign up for an account, choose your desired course, and click 'Enroll Now'. Payment options include credit card and UPI.

title: Support
content: For support, contact us at support@studynotion.com or use the live chat available on the website.

title: available courses
content: We offer the following courses: DSA, Web Development, App Development, DevOps, and Data Analytics.

title: top instructors
content: Our top instructors are: Striver, Aditya Verma, and Harkirat.

title: best selling courses
content: Best selling course: DSA by Striver, Price: 2500 INR, Validity: 1 year, Level: Zero to Hero.

title: DSA
content: Available DSA courses: DSA for Beginners, DSA Advanced, Competitive Programming, DSA Interview Prep.

title: Web Development
content: Available Web Development courses: HTML & CSS Bootcamp, JavaScript Essentials, React & Redux, Full Stack Web Development.

title: App Development
content: Available App Development courses: Android App Development, iOS App Development, Flutter Cross-Platform Development.

title: DevOps
content: Available DevOps courses: DevOps Fundamentals, Docker & Kubernetes, CI/CD Pipeline, Cloud Infrastructure.

title: Data Analytics
content: Available Data Analytics courses: Excel & SQL for Data Analysis, Python for Data Analytics, Power BI, Machine Learning Basics.

title: support
content: For support, contact us at support@studynotion.com or use the live chat available on the website.

title: contact
content: You can contact us via email at support@studynotion.com or visit the Contact page on the website.

title: payment options available
content: We accept payments via Credit Card, Debit Card, UPI, and Netbanking.

title: unavailable courses
content: Sorry, this course is not available currently.
